overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a narrow rocky trail through dense forest. The path is illuminated by a warm headlamp, revealing tree roots, rocks, and thick vegetation on both sides as the hiker progresses through the dark woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with overhead canopy

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the uneven rocky path, navigating by headlamp light through the dense forest

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the night sky
uneven trail surface with exposed rocks and tree roots
dense bushes and small trees lining the left side of the trail
thick vegetation and tree trunks on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking through a densely forested trail at night. The headlamp illuminates the rocky dirt path ahead while thick vegetation and tree trunks line both sides, creating an enclosed feeling with minimal sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with prominent rock formation

events.description: large pale rock or stump becomes visible on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, approaching and passing a large pale rock formation on the right while navigating the uneven ground

entered.detail: tall light-colored rock formation or tree stump on the right side of the path
dark night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy ahead

segments.scene_description: As the hiker progresses, the forest canopy opens slightly revealing more night sky ahead. A large pale rock or stump becomes prominent on the right side of the trail around the 15-second mark. The path remains rocky and uneven, with the headlamp continuing to illuminate the immediate foreground while the surrounding forest remains dark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens up toward the night sky. It begins with a headlamp cutting through the darkness, illuminating a rocky dirt path tightly enclosed by thick vegetation and towering tree trunks. As the hiker progresses, the dense canopy begins to thin, allowing more of the dark sky to become visible overhead. The scene then shifts as a large, pale rock or stump emerges prominently on the right side of the uneven trail. Finally, the camera continues forward, with the warm light focusing on the immediate rocky foreground while the surrounding woodland remains shrouded in deep shadow.
